judgment.summary: A high-growth business with strong gross margins and cash flow, offset by net losses and a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS beat estimates by 12.1% (1.65 vs 1.47), with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% — shows strong top-line momentum.
Gross margin 71.7% — indicates high product profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) $463.32M — demonstrates healthy cash generation.
Total cash $2.39B vs $62.83M debt — provides a massive liquidity cushion.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% — company is currently not profitable.
Forward P/E 46.93x — priced for significant growth.
Debt/Equity 2.13 — indicates a leveraged capital structure.
Quarterly earnings growth -1.9% — shows recent earnings deceleration.

news.paragraph: MongoDB is balancing new AI data platform capabilities and an expansion in Ireland against recent downward pressure from a lack of near-term estimate upside. While Citi has lifted its target price and opened a positive catalyst watch on the stock, some headlines report recent share price declines. Options traders should consider these competing growth drivers and analyst outlooks when evaluating upcoming volatility.
